description: The rendered token shape consumed by the AI Gateway.

encryptedToken.description: The token, encrypted using the key referenced by keyID, consumed by the AI Gateway.

headerKey.description: The header key used to pass the token to the provider.
headerKey.title: headerKey

headerValue.description: The header value used to pass the token to the provider.
headerValue.title: headerValue

keyID.description: The key ID used to identify the encryption key for this token.
keyID.title: keyID
